headline: Is Verizon Communications Inc. (VZ) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is VZ a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Verizon Communications Inc. on The Boring Finance Guy’s Substack. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on VZ. Verizon Communications Inc.’s share was trading at $50.37 as of March 25th. VZ’s trailing and forward P/E were 12.31 and 10.16 respectively according to Yahoo […]

headline: Warehouses face $100K-hour downtime risk as cloud outages mount
summary: Cloud outages cost warehouses up to $100K/hour. 84% of operators had major disruptions recently. Brian Kirst on the rise of hybrid WMS. The post Warehouses face $100K-hour downtime risk as cloud outages mount appeared first on FreightWaves.

headline: AT&T puts loyalty at risk with stern warning to customers
summary: AT&T has rapidly lost phone customers as rivals ramp up deals and discounts on wireless services. Amid these challenges, the carrier risks further hurting loyalty after recently warning customers of a major change to its wireless plans. Last year, Verizon and AT&T doubled down on ...
